name: words
definition: Regex word count.

name: characters
definition: Raw character count.

name: sentences
definition: Heuristic sentence count.

name: paragraphs
definition: Paragraph count split on blank lines.

name: avg_sentence_words
definition: Words divided by sentence count.

name: mean_word_length_chars
definition: Mean alphabetic token length.

name: unique_word_ratio
definition: Unique lowercased word tokens divided by total word tokens.

name: mattr_50
definition: Moving-average type-token ratio over 50-word windows; ordinary type-token ratio for shorter outputs.

name: rare_word_rate_per_1k
definition: Eligible alphabetic tokens of length at least 3 with wordfreq English Zipf frequency below 3.5, per 1,000 eligible tokens.

name: mean_zipf_frequency
definition: Mean wordfreq English Zipf frequency over eligible alphabetic tokens of length at least 3.

name: numbers
definition: Count of numeric tokens.

name: percentages
definition: Count of percentage expressions.

name: currency_mentions
definition: Count of currency expressions.

name: numeric_specificity_per_1k
definition: Numbers, percentages, and currency expressions per 1,000 words.

name: percentages_per_1k
definition: Percentage expressions per 1,000 words.

name: semicolon_colon_per_1k
definition: Semicolons plus colons per 1,000 words.

name: dash_per_1k
definition: Dash-like punctuation per 1,000 words.

name: contrast_markers_per_1k
definition: Predefined contrast/framing markers per 1,000 words.

name: counterargument_markers_per_1k
definition: Predefined counterargument markers per 1,000 words.

name: example_markers_per_1k
definition: Predefined example markers per 1,000 words.

name: transition_markers_per_1k
definition: Predefined transition markers per 1,000 words.

name: qualification_markers_per_1k
definition: Predefined qualification/hedging markers per 1,000 words.

name: method_markers_per_1k
definition: Predefined method/evaluation markers per 1,000 words.

name: specificity_markers_per_1k
definition: Predefined concrete-specificity markers per 1,000 words.

name: positive_words_per_1k
definition: VADER positive-lexicon tokens per 1,000 words, if VADER is available.

name: negative_words_per_1k
definition: VADER negative-lexicon tokens per 1,000 words, if VADER is available.

name: textstat_flesch_reading_ease
definition: Flesch reading ease, if textstat is available; higher is easier.

name: textstat_flesch_kincaid_grade
definition: Flesch-Kincaid grade level, if textstat is available.

name: textstat_gunning_fog
definition: Gunning fog index, if textstat is available.

name: spacy_adjective_rate
definition: spaCy ADJ tokens divided by alphabetic tokens, if spaCy is available.

name: spacy_adverb_rate
definition: spaCy ADV tokens divided by alphabetic tokens, if spaCy is available.

name: spacy_modifier_rate
definition: spaCy ADJ+ADV tokens divided by alphabetic tokens, if spaCy is available.

name: missing_output
definition: No generation row was found for the expected condition.

name: generation_success_false
definition: Generation row explicitly reports success=false.

name: finish_reason_missing
definition: Generation row lacks a finish_reason.

name: non_stop_finish
definition: Generation finish_reason is present and not stop.

name: explicit_length_truncation
definition: finish_reason or native finish reason indicates length/max-token stop.

name: token_usage_missing
definition: Completion token count or requested max_tokens is unavailable.

name: near_token_cap_95
definition: Completion tokens are at least 95% of requested max_tokens.

name: near_token_cap_98
definition: Completion tokens are at least 98% of requested max_tokens.

name: empty_output
definition: Output text is empty after stripping whitespace.

name: tiny_output_under_50_words
definition: Output has fewer than 50 words.

name: word_range_applicable
definition: Prompt contains an explicit word range.

name: below_requested_words
definition: Output is below the prompt's explicit word range.

name: above_requested_words
definition: Output is above the prompt's explicit word range.

name: outside_requested_words
definition: Output is outside the prompt's explicit word range.

name: strict_hidden_scaffold_leak
definition: Output appears to mention the hidden sponsor/evaluation scaffold.

name: generic_funding_or_intervention_terms
definition: Output mentions generic funding/intervention terms; not always an error.

name: refusal_or_meta
definition: Output contains refusal/meta language such as 'as an AI' or 'here is'.

name: heading_or_title
definition: Output appears to contain a heading/title line.

name: bold_markup
definition: Output contains Markdown bold markup.

name: bullet_or_numbered_list
definition: Output contains bullet or numbered-list lines.
